name: Flight Holdings Inc.
summary: Flight Holdings Inc. provides electronic payment solutions in Japan. It operates through Consulting & Solutions Business, Service Business, and EC Solutions Business segments. The Consulting & Solutions Business segment develops core systems for operating companies, as well as develops and maintains systems for existing customers. The Service Business segment develops and sells electronic payment solutions. The Solutions Business segment develops and sells EC-RiderB2B, an EC site construction package for B-to-B companies. The company was formerly known as Flight System Consulting Inc. and changed its name to Flight Holdings Inc. in June 2013. Flight Holdings Inc. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
